_why: Claude Code harness: hub via the agent-adapter plugin. The dev-channels flag is required for autonomous wakeup injection; its confirmation banner is per-session (no config bypass exists). Sovereign per-agent CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, seeded idempotently at launch.
_selfWrites: claude owns everything under CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR (.claude.json, settings.json, plugins/) — ois seeds once + repairs trust flag only; never diffs the rest
_configDirNote: Sovereign dirs hold non-regenerable login-class state; seeding repairs the workspace trust flag only and never touches credentials.
_statusLineWhy: Estate-owned copy of the operator statusline (cwd/model/ctx/rate-limit burn) — sovereign configs must not reference the operator config dir. Seeded into settings.json; seed also repairs the field if absent.
